2604.18468.title: Asset Harvester: Extracting 3D Assets from Autonomous Driving Logs for Simulation
2604.18468.paper_summary: Closed-loop simulation is a core component of autonomous vehicle (AV) development, enabling scalable testing, training, and safety validation before real-world deployment. Neural scene reconstruction converts driving logs into interactive 3D environments for simulation, but it does not produce complete 3D object assets required for agent manipulation and large-viewpoint novel-view synthesis. To address this challenge, we present Asset Harvester, an image-to-3D model and end-to-end pipeline that converts sparse, in-the-wild object observations from real driving logs into complete, simulation-ready assets. Rather than relying on a single model component, we developed a system-level design for real-world AV data that combines large-scale curation of object-centric training tuples, geometry-aware preprocessing across heterogeneous sensors, and a robust training recipe that couples sparse-view-conditioned multiview generation with 3D Gaussian lifting. Within this system, SparseViewDiT is explicitly designed to address limited-angle views and other real-world data challenges. Together with hybrid data curation, augmentation, and self-distillation, this system enables scalable conversion of sparse AV object observations into reusable 3D assets.
2604.18468.paper_summary_zh: 閉環模擬是自主車輛（AV）開發的核心組成部分，使得在實際部署之前能夠進行可擴展的測試、訓練和安全驗證。神經場景重建將駕駛日誌轉換為互動的3D環境以進行模擬，但它並未產生代理操作和大視角新視圖合成所需的完整3D物件資產。為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了Asset Harvester，一個圖像到3D模型的端到端管道，將來自真實駕駛日誌的稀疏野外物件觀察轉換為完整的、適合模擬的資產。我們不是依賴單一模型組件，而是為真實世界AV數據開發了一個系統級設計，結合了對物件中心訓練元組的大規模策劃、跨異構傳感器的幾何感知預處理，以及一個穩健的訓練配方，將稀疏視圖條件的多視圖生成與3D高斯提升相結合。在這個系統中，SparseViewDiT被明確設計用來解決有限角度視圖和其他真實世界數據挑戰。結合混合數據策劃、增強和自我蒸餾，這個系統實現了將稀疏AV物件觀察可擴展地轉換為可重用的3D資產。
2604.18468.author: Tianshi Cao et.al.
2604.18468.authors: Tianshi Cao, Jiawei Ren, Yuxuan Zhang, Jaewoo Seo, Jiahui Huang, Shikhar Solanki, Haotian Zhang, Mingfei Guo, Haithem Turki, Muxingzi Li, Yue Zhu, Sipeng Zhang, Zan Gojcic, Sanja Fidler, Kangxue Yin
